3038270.name: CABALL: Innocence
3038270.description:
A standalone continuation of the "CABALL" series, seen through the eyes of other characters, under different circumstances.

Michelle's orderly life was clouded only by the absence of her grandfather, who had distanced himself from the family for years. The beloved man who had entertained her with fairy tales in childhood and surrounded her with care in her youth had left the city and reacted coldly to any attempt to meet.

And then, as if a gift, on her birthday, Michelle finds a letter with congratulations and an unfamiliar address. A special gift had been prepared for her in a special place.

Features:

  • Two romantic interests and one questionable humorist;

  • Four endings and a few silly deaths;

  • A visual novel with an atmosphere of fairy-tale mystery, danger, and peculiar romance;

  • Your choices matter.
